title: Print Spooler Stuck — Jobs Not Printing

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Print jobs queued but nothing printing on HP LaserJet 3rd floor
servicenow_seed.description: Several users on the 3rd floor report that print jobs go into the queue on PRINT-SRV-03 but never print. The HP LaserJet M507 shows online and no errors on its front panel. This started approximately 1 hour ago.

correct_steps: Validate the caller and confirm affected printer name and print server
RDP to PRINT-SRV-03 or use Server Manager
Open services.msc → stop the Print Spooler service
Ask a user to send a test print; confirm jobs now clear
rationale: A stuck spooler on a single shared printer is a standard Tier 1 print server fix. No escalation needed unless the spooler crashes again within an hour (indicates a deeper driver conflict).
